event: Portrait of an Arizona cowboy on horseback
description: A watercolor and ink illustration of a cowboy sitting atop a standing brown horse against a pale background. The rider wears a wide-brimmed hat, a vest over a light shirt, leather chaps over trousers, and holds the reins loosely. The horse is rendered in warm brown tones with careful attention to its muscular form and tack. The style is realistic with a documentary quality, capturing the figure with minimal background detail.
